creator: hans.petter.selasky@bitfrost.no
text:
The up-to-date bsd.gcc.mk conf should fix the problem. I don't have time right now to kick another build.

 

--HPS
 
-----Original message-----
From:Raphael Kubo da Costa <rakuco@FreeBSD.org>
Sent:Sun 05-08-2012 05:09
Subject:Re: ports/170372: www/chromium is not build
To:bug-followup@FreeBSD.org; 
CC:gerald@FreeBSD.org; hselasky@FreeBSD.org; 
If I recall correctly, hselasky@ had this problem, which was fixed by gerald@
(I've CC'ed both) in SVN r301973.

Can you confirm you have an up-to-date bsd.gcc.mk?
